carry_forwards: The retro schema needed an optional `sections` array to migrate real freeform retros losslessly (logged at 014); future schemas authored before migrating real data should expect a similar prose-overflow need.
DoD checkboxes remain artifact-not-data (decision d); revisit only if a gate ever needs machine-checkable DoD completion.
The Repository seam is designed for a swappable backing (GitHub/Jira) but only the filesystem backing exists; the replaceability claim is unproven by use.
Discovery verbs (entities/schema/get) make cold-start orientation possible; the next consumer is an agent driving lume purely through those verbs.

done_when.clause: Workstream/iteration state stored as schema-validated JSON
done_when.evidence: state.json, objective.json, iterations/NNN.json, decisions.json, retro.json all validate against schemas in lume/schemas/ via validate_entity at every load and save. Invalid state is rejected at the Repository/Workstream boundary (SchemaError).

done_when.clause: CLI is the sole mutator and exposes verbs to discover entities and fetch their schema
done_when.evidence: Mutators (new/open/transition/plan/decide/retro/close) write only via state + validated JSON; discovery verbs `lume entities`, `lume schema <entity>`, `lume get` are read-only and machine-parseable (P6). An agent can orient cold.

done_when.clause: Human-readable markdown is regenerated from state rather than authored
done_when.evidence: snapshot.md, plan.md, objective.md, iterations/NNN.md, decisions.md, retro.md are all derived views regenerated on mutation. grep confirms the engine reads no machine field from any .md; the only .md reads are in migrate.py, the explicit legacy bridge.

done_when.clause: This workstream itself is tracked under the new JSON state to prove it
done_when.evidence: state-as-data ran all 15 iterations on state.json; its decisions and this retro are authored as decisions.json/retro.json. Dogfooded end to end, including this close-out.

overall_verdict: Net positive. Storing state as schema-validated JSON bought back more than its ceremony cost: the source of truth is now queryable and deterministically mutable, markdown stopped being a thing to hand-maintain, and an agent can discover entities and their schemas cold. The ceremony (schemas + a ~40-line vendored validator + the migration converter) was paid once and stayed small, exactly as decision GO predicted. Every flip was behaviour-preserving and grep-verified, and the repeating _load/_save/_render + render/parse pattern made each later artifact conversion cheaper. All four done-when clauses are MET. Honest caveat: the multi-workstream and future-backing-swap (GitHub/Jira via the Repository seam) claims are proven by tests and design, not yet by lived use.

stage_verdicts.saved: Mapped exactly what machine state lived in markdown (status, the iteration quad, verdict outcomes, plan-item lines) and confirmed snapshot.md already proved view-from-state. Bounded the extraction and surfaced the six forks before any schema was written.

stage_verdicts.cost: Two planning iterations + standing up plan.md/decisions.md; 009 re-planned the full-content artifacts.
stage_verdicts.saved: Resolved all six forks with logged rationale (GO, one-state.json-per-workstream, vendored validator, one-shot migration, checkboxes-as-artifact, auto-regen, Repository seam). Every execution slice opened with a ready DoD. The P4 split (P4a/P4b) was absorbed mid-stream as a logged plan change, not a derail.

stage_verdicts.cost: Eleven execution iterations: schemas+validator, state.json I/O, migration, the model bridge + source-of-truth flip, discovery verbs, then the content artifacts (new schemas, plan, objective, iterations, decisions+retro).
stage_verdicts.saved: Each flip was behaviour-preserving and grep-verified (no machine field read from markdown). The triple pattern (_load/_save/_render + render/parse) repeated cleanly from objective to iterations to decisions/retro, so each later slice was cheaper than the last. Migration round-tripped all three workstreams as free validation.
Forces the honest done-when assessment and authors the retro on the very tooling the workstream built - the final dogfood.
